tips.title: Buy Low, Sell High
tips.body: The fundamental rule of trading. Look for assets that are undervalued.

tips.title: Diversify
tips.body: Don't put all your eggs in one basket. Spread risk across different Asset categories.

tips.title: Manage Risk
tips.body: Never risk more than 1-2% of your total capital on a single trade.

tips.title: Follow Trends
tips.body: The trend is your friend until it bends. Trade in the direction of the market.

tips.title: Control Emotions
tips.body: Fear and greed are your worst enemies. Stick to your trading plan.

tips.title: Understand Leverage
tips.body: Leverage amplifies both gains and losses. Use it with extreme caution.

tips.title: Technical Analysis
tips.body: Learn to read charts and identify key support and resistance levels.

tips.title: Stay Informed
tips.body: Keep up with news events that can move the markets.

tips.title: Keep a Journal
tips.body: Record your trades to learn from your mistakes and successes.

tips.title: Patience is Key
tips.body: Sometimes the best trade is no trade at all. Wait for the right setup.
